hero_subtitle: The fastest way to mock REST, GraphQL, WebSocket, and gRPC.
screenshots_subtitle: A beautiful dark-themed Web UI for managing all your mock endpoints
screenshots_routes_dashboard_desc: View and manage all your mock routes
screenshots_request_logs_desc: Debug and inspect all incoming requests in real-time
features_subtitle: Full-featured mock server in a single binary
features_rest_desc: Dynamic routes, path parameters, wildcards, conditional responses
features_js_desc: Write dynamic responses with full JS access to request context
features_swagger_desc: Import OpenAPI 2.0/3.x specs, auto-generate mock routes
features_websocket_desc: Mock WebSocket endpoints with auto-reply or JS handlers
features_graphql_desc: Mock queries and mutations with operation-based matching
features_grpc_desc: gRPC-Web compatible HTTP endpoints with proto import
features_webui_desc: Dark theme interface, manage routes without config files
features_proxy_desc: Forward unmatched requests to real backend
features_zerodeps_desc: Single Go binary, no Node.js, no runtime dependencies
footer_copyright: © 2026 MockAPI. Built with Go. MIT License.
pricing_subtitle: Free forever for individuals. Pro features for teams.
pricing_free_desc: Perfect for individual developers and small projects.
pricing_pro_desc: For teams that need collaboration and cloud sync.
pricing_feature_core: All core features (REST, GraphQL, WebSocket, gRPC)
pricing_faq_a1: Yes! The core MockAPI is open source under MIT license and completely free to use. You can run it locally forever at no cost.
pricing_faq_q2: What's the difference between Free and Pro?
pricing_faq_a2: Free is for local development. Pro adds team collaboration, cloud sync, and priority support for teams working together.
pricing_faq_q3: Can I use MockAPI in production?
pricing_faq_a3: MockAPI is designed for development and testing. For production, we recommend using the proxy mode to forward to real backends.
pricing_faq_a4: Open an issue on GitHub for community support. Pro users get priority email support.
feedback_subtitle: Help us make MockAPI better. We read every message.
feedback_message_placeholder: Tell us what's on your mind...
